title: Luxury Beauty Campaign Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Luxury Beauty Campaign Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 luxury beauty campaign poster for LUMIERE VEIL, featuring adult woman with natural makeup, elegant neck line, soft lips, and loose natural hair strands with the headline GLOW. Subject: adult woman with natural makeup, elegant neck line, soft lips, and loose natural hair strands appears in a close beauty portrait using a left side profile angle, with realistic skin texture, soft lips, elegant neck and collarbone, and the key focus on skin glow along the jawline and collarbone. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Single vertical poster crop: face and neck dominate one side, oversized translucent serif title layered behind or beside the portrait, small brand/subtitle at top, red handwritten accent near the title, slogan and main copy placed in a clean editorial hierarchy. Signature Elements: Oversized translucent serif typography, one red handwritten script accent, tiny luxury logo placement, luminous side profile, soft reverse light, and refined beauty-campaign footer details. Fixed source details: Palette Choice: cream beige, pearl white, and champagne gold. Style: High-end editorial beauty advertising with luminous commercial polish, cinematic restraint, realistic pores and hair strands, refined luxury-magazine finish, minimal retouching, and elegant negative space. Color Palette: Brand: BRAND NAME Subtitle: BRAND SUBTITLE Main title: PROFILE, GLOW, VEIL, ECLAT Red script word: refine, luminous, softly, timeless Slogan: SHORT SLOGAN Main copy: MAIN COPY Portrait angle: black, white, dark silver, controls the campaign palette, with soft tonal contrast, pearlescent highlights, warm skin tones, and a restrained premium finish. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Close-up side-profile or semi-profile portrait, shallow depth of field, editorial lens compression, sharp facial contour, and polished vertical campaign framing. Typography: Visible text includes LUMIERE VEIL, SKINCARE ATELIER, GLOW, red script word luminous, slogan Soft light, held close, and short main copy A refined serum ritual for pearl-soft skin; use English text only and keep every line readable. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Luxury Beauty Campaign Portrait Lumiere Veil

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 luxury beauty campaign poster for MAISON ECLAT, featuring adult woman in a refined fragrance portrait with realistic skin texture and calm editorial expression with the headline VEIL. Subject: adult woman in a refined fragrance portrait with realistic skin texture and calm editorial expression appears in a close beauty portrait using a lowered right side profile angle, with realistic skin texture, soft lips, elegant neck and collarbone, and the key focus on pearl earring, neck curve, and soft fragrance glow. Scene: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Composition: Single vertical poster crop: face and neck dominate one side, oversized translucent serif title layered behind or beside the portrait, small brand/subtitle at top, red handwritten accent near the title, slogan and main copy placed in a clean editorial hierarchy. Signature Elements: Oversized translucent serif typography, one red handwritten script accent, tiny luxury logo placement, luminous side profile, soft reverse light, and refined beauty-campaign footer details. Fixed source details: Palette Choice: misty rose, soft silver, and warm ivory. Style: High-end editorial beauty advertising with luminous commercial polish, cinematic restraint, realistic pores and hair strands, refined luxury-magazine finish, minimal retouching, and elegant negative space. Color Palette: Brand: BRAND NAME Subtitle: BRAND SUBTITLE Main title: PROFILE, GLOW, VEIL, ECLAT Red script word: refine, luminous, softly, timeless Slogan: SHORT SLOGAN Main copy: MAIN COPY Portrait angle: black, white, dark silver, controls the campaign palette, with soft tonal contrast, pearlescent highlights, warm skin tones, and a restrained premium finish. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Close-up side-profile or semi-profile portrait, shallow depth of field, editorial lens compression, sharp facial contour, and polished vertical campaign framing. Typography: Visible text includes MAISON ECLAT, FINE FRAGRANCE, VEIL, red script word timeless, slogan A quiet trace of light, and short main copy An intimate fragrance portrait with pearl earring detail; use English text only and keep every line readable. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
